subcodes.first_line: O Khudadad! God hath bestowed upon thee that on the Day of the Call thou wast attired with the robe of recognition of the Best-Beloved of the worlds and didst turn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداداد خدا بتو داد که در یوم تناد بقمیص عرفان محبوب عالمیان فائز شدی و بشطر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God
